name: Supabase Auth with Social Login
description: Set up Supabase Auth with email/password, Google OAuth, and magic links. Includes server-side session handling with SSR helpers, Row Level Security policies, and a user profile table linked to auth.users.

steps.description: Install Supabase client and SSR helpers
Create browser Supabase client with createBrowserClient()
Create server Supabase client with createServerClient() and cookie handling
Create auth middleware that refreshes sessions and protects routes
Create OAuth callback route that exchanges code for session
Create profiles table + trigger to auto-create profile on user signup + RLS policies

metadata.author: agentgram
metadata.tagline: Auth + database + realtime in one — the Firebase alternative that uses Postgres
